decisions.title: HVAC Duct Routing Conflict — Grid B3, Level 1
decisions.question: Approve reroute of HVAC supply duct from Grid B3 to Grid C3 to resolve 220mm clearance deficit.

ai_analysis.situation: HVAC duct routing conflict at Grid B3, Level 1. W310x97 beam — 220mm clearance deficit.

pre_approval.condition: Reroute stays within Zone C corridor.

ai_analysis.recommended_action: Contact James Okafor (L3) for pre-approval of Grid C3 reroute.
